name: test_recording_flu_vaccination_e2e
description:
Test: End-to-end test for recording a flu vaccination for a child.
Steps:
1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch name.
2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
3. Agree to flu vaccination, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress, register child as attending.
5. Record flu vaccination for the child.
Verification:
- Final consent message is shown after online consent.
- Vaccination is recorded for the child in the session.
descriptionHtml:
Test: End-to-end test for recording a flu vaccination for a child.
Steps:

  1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch name.
  2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
  3. Agree to flu vaccination, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
  4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress, register child as attending.
  5. Record flu vaccination for the child.
    Verification:
  • Final consent message is shown after online consent.
  • Vaccination is recorded for the child in the session.
statusMessage:
playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
Call log:
  - waiting for get_by_role("textbox", name="Email address")
statusTrace:
flu_consent_url = '/consents/Gk3k5Q1hH5/flu/start'
setup_session_for_flu = ['ABC123']
online_consent_page = <mavis.test.pages.online_consent.OnlineConsentPage object at 0x7fc425d03890>
sessions_page = <mavis.test.pages.sessions.SessionsPage object at 0x7fc425d03250>
start_page = <mavis.test.pages.start.StartPage object at 0x7fc426175670>
schools = [School(name='The Fulham Prep School Ltd', urn='131165', site=None), School(name='Dyson Perrins CofE Academy', urn='137186', site=None)]
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Leanne', last_name='WRIGHT', nhs_number='9129507065', address=('Flat 97', 'Brown fords', 'P...clarkkyle@example.net'), Parent(full_name='Abigail Dennis', relationship='Mum', email_address='ahicks@example.org')))]}
dashboard_page = <mavis.test.pages.dashboard.DashboardPage object at 0x7fc42473d5a0>
log_in_page = <mavis.test.pages.log_in.LogInPage object at 0x7fc425fb5db0>
nurse = User(username='gemma29@example.com', password='gemma29@example.com', role='nurse')
team = Team(name='Chapman, Rogers and Kelly est. 1830', workgroup='Q008K', careplus_venue_code='Q008K', email='lydiawatkins@example.org', phone='(07700) 900011')

    def test_recording_flu_vaccination_e2e(
        flu_consent_url,
        setup_session_for_flu,
        online_consent_page,
        sessions_page,
        start_page,
        schools,
        children,
        dashboard_page,
        log_in_page,
        nurse,
        team,
    ):
        """
        Test: End-to-end test for recording a flu vaccination for a child.
        Steps:
        1. Setup: Log in as nurse, create session, import class list, and get batch name.
        2. Go to online consent URL and fill in child and parent details.
        3. Agree to flu vaccination, fill address, answer health questions, and confirm.
        4. Log in as nurse, navigate to session, set session in progress, register child as attending.
        5. Record flu vaccination for the child.
        Verification:
        - Final consent message is shown after online consent.
        - Vaccination is recorded for the child in the session.
        """
        child = children[Programme.FLU][0]
        schools = schools[Programme.FLU]
        fluenz_batch_name = setup_session_for_flu[0]
    
        online_consent_page.go_to_url(flu_consent_url)
        start_page.start()
    
        online_consent_page.fill_details(child, child.parents[0], schools)
        online_consent_page.agree_to_flu_vaccination(consent_option=ConsentOption.BOTH)
        online_consent_page.fill_address_details(*child.address)
        online_consent_page.answer_health_questions(11, health_question=False)
        online_consent_page.click_confirm()
        online_consent_page.check_final_consent_message(
            child,
            programmes=[Programme.FLU],
            health_question=False,
            consent_option=ConsentOption.BOTH,
        )
    
        log_in_page.navigate()
>       log_in_page.log_in_and_choose_team_if_necessary(nurse, team)
